claim_text: apm install --skill '*' resets the selection to install all skills in a collection.

evidence.snippet: help="Install only named skill(s) from a SKILL_BUNDLE. Repeatable. Persisted in apm.yml and apm.lock so bare 'apm install' is deterministic. Use --skill '*' to reset to all skills.",
# Normalize --skill: '*' means all (same as absent). Reject with --mcp.
skill_subset_from_cli: bool = False  # True when user passed --skill (even --skill '*')
